NameGen.Description: Creates names for goblins, gremlins, and bugaboos.

Join.Markov: Aggro Arg Argleblargle Argwog Arklesnarck Arzlewig Barklesnurg Blarkblark Blurm Bnarzleback Bnitzlebong Bnurklesnang Bogsnoggle Booglin Braggle Brizzle Buckyuck Bugbug Buggle Buggleyuck Buglin Burglebung Buzzlebong Buzzlegunk Choggle Chuggle Chuggo Chugwog Chugwoggle Chugwug Chugwuzzle Dargle Dargleblargle Dnitzlediz Dogirm Dunzledim Eck Eckblozzo Eckblurgle Ecksnitz Eggle Erckorg Erckozzle Ezzlebug Fargle Fnarkle Fnarz Fnazzle Fnig Fniggleblurk Fnitz Fnog Fnurglebonk Fnurz Foggo Foglin Fonk Fonkle Fugglesnort Glark Gloggo Glugglesnog Glurg Glurk Gluzzleblark Gnargle Gnarkle Gnurklesnargle Gonko Gorgle Gorgo Grackle Grark Grazzlesnub Gricklesnip Gritzlebing Grizzle Grizzleblargle Grizzleblark Grizzleblurgle Groggo Grozzo Gruggle Grurg Grurk Gruzwuzzle Gruzzle Gullybung Gullywog Hargle Hargleblargle Hargleblurgle Harglebluzzle Hoggle Huggle Huggo Irklebirkle Irkobbork Itzleblurk Jacko Jaggle Jagwog Jickerblaz Joggler Jugglesnog Kergrozzle Kludge Krackleblaz Krucko Kurgo Lerkle Lurkimer Moggle Muggler Murkimer Nargle Narglebargle Narkleblaz Nitzsnitz Norkimer Norknork Ogg Ogglebog Piggle Pirklesnitz Platzle Plunk Pnitzig Pnucko Pockle Poggo Pollywog Porgle Pucksnitz Puggle Puglin Punkle Purkle Quarkle Quogbug Raggle Rargle Snaggle Snitzleburk Snogglesnort Snoggum Snoo Snortle Snozzle Snubblub Snuggo Snuzangle Snuzle Snuzzle Sockobbock Soggo Splutz Splutzle Struggos Stunk Suckobruck Suggle Tangle Targle Tniggle Tnurglurk Troglin Tuggo Turnglebling Ubzog Ugg Ugglebiggle Uggo Uggoboggo Uggrug Ugwug Urgle Warckle Warzle Whoggo Whuggle Wigglerug Woggle Woggo Wogwog Wozzo Wugglewug Wuglin Wurgle Wuzzlewog Yaggle Yockoblock Yogle Yucko Yuggo

Repeat.Words: anger bad bite biter blade blood bone breaker bug cackle cave claw club crazed crooked cruel dark dirt doom dread dumb eater evil eye face fear filth fist foot foul glare gloom glum green grey grim grime grin grip grit hand hide horror hunter killer knife knuckle lash lasher little mad mean mud murder murmur mutter nose pain poison rat rot rotten scream shadow sick skull slicer smack smash snake snapper snare snarl snatch snatcher sneak spider stab stare steel stink stinker swipe switch tangle teeth terror thief toe tooth trap twist twisted weasle worg worm yellow
